pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 57: api('add_survey', ...) creates survey with exact name. Also verified in export_result.sh line 11 fallback lookup.
setup_task.sh line 70: Gender question created with 'title': 'GENDER'. This code is used as the question identifier in LimeSurvey.
setup_task.sh line 78: Answer added with code 'M' and text 'Male'. Task description requires 'Male Respondents' quota.
task.json line 20 and task description step 2. Verified by verifier.py line 44 expected_map['M'] = 200
setup_task.sh line 78: api('add_answer', ..., 'M', ..., 'Male'). This answer code links Male responses to the quota.
setup_task.sh line 79: Answer added with code 'F' and text 'Female'. Task description requires 'Female Respondents' quota.
task.json line 21 and task description step 2. Verified by verifier.py line 45 expected_map['F'] = 200
setup_task.sh line 79: api('add_answer', ..., 'F', ..., 'Female'). This answer code links Female responses to the quota.
setup_task.sh line 80: Answer added with code 'NB' and text 'Non-binary'. Task description requires 'Non-binary Respondents' quota.
task.json line 22 and task description step 2. Verified by verifier.py line 46 expected_map['NB'] = 50
setup_task.sh line 80: api('add_answer', ..., 'NB', ..., 'Non-binary'). This answer code links Non-binary responses to the quota.

task.json line 5 contains full message: 'Thank you for your interest. This demographic group has reached its target number of responses.' Verified by verifier.py line 85 which checks for 'target number of responses' in quota message.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetic LimeSurvey 'Consumer Electronics Satisfaction Study Q4 2024' survey created programmatically via RemoteControl API. The Gender question (code: GENDER) has three answer options: M (Male), F (Female), and NB (Non-binary). The task requires creating three quotas with limits of 200 for Male, 200 for Female, and 50 for Non-binary responses. All quotas must include the message phrase 'target number of responses' and be set to terminate the survey when limits are reached.
